name: Google_Maps_Navigator
description: Manages location services and spatial intelligence via Google Maps Platform APIs. Geocodes addresses to coordinates, reverse geocodes coordinates to addresses, searches for nearby places, retrieves place details, and calculates directions between locations. Bridges spatial intent from the Mind to actionable location intelligence and route planning.
progressive_unlock: Address geocoding available immediately. Place search and directions unlock after Mind has successfully geocoded at least one address to demonstrate location capability understanding. Detailed place information and advanced route planning unlock after first place search.
constraints: Never expose Google Maps API key in logs, outputs, or external communications
Respect Google Maps Platform rate limits (varies by API and usage tier, default generous with billing enabled)
Validate coordinates are within valid range: latitude [-90, 90], longitude [-180, 180]
Cache geocoding results when possible to reduce quota consumption — same address queries within 24 hours should use cached coordinates
Respect location data privacy — never store or transmit location data beyond necessary API calls
For place search, default radius to 5000 meters if not specified; respect max radius of 50000 meters
Always validate address format before geocoding; suggest corrections for ambiguous queries
For directions, verify origin and destination are distinct before requesting routes
Use traffic-aware routing only when departure time is specified and available
Prefer coordinate input (lat,lng) over place IDs when source data provides exact coordinates for faster API resolution

steps.instruction: Validate input against Layer 3 Tool Schema. Confirm required parameters present and correctly typed. For coordinates, verify latitude [-90,90] and longitude [-180,180].
Retrieve Google Maps API key from TENET.apiKey.google_maps. Validate key is present and active (non-empty string).
Determine intent: geocode (address to coordinates), reverse geocode (coordinates to address), place search (keyword search), place details (retrieve full place info), or directions (routing).

For geocoding: check STREAM.cache.geocoding_cache for address match within 24 hours. If found, use cached coordinates. Otherwise, execute GMaps_Geocode. Cache result with timestamp. Validate response status is 'OK' and results array is not empty.

For reverse geocoding: execute GMaps_ReverseGeocode with formatted coordinates. Parse response to extract street_address, locality, administrative_area, postal_code, and country. Return formatted human-readable address.

For place search: verify location parameter in 'lat,lng' format. Default radius to 5000m if not provided. Execute GMaps_PlaceSearch. Parse results and format as list with place names, ratings, and place IDs. Store place IDs in STREAM for follow-up detail queries.

For place details: execute GMaps_PlaceDetails with place_id and optimized field list to reduce quota usage. Return formatted details: name, address, phone, website, hours, rating, review count, and top 3 reviews if requested.

For directions: verify origin and destination are distinct. Parse mode parameter (default 'driving'). Execute GMaps_Directions. Extract and return: total distance, total duration, turn-by-turn steps, and polyline (if available). If alternatives requested, include all routes ranked by duration.

Compile location/route summary with key findings: resolved coordinates, place information, or driving directions. For directions, include estimated arrival time. Push spatial intelligence to LTM with key: 'gmaps_location_{date}' or 'gmaps_route_{destination}_{date}'. Update STREAM with active location cache and recent place IDs.
